postBody: To work with a reputed organization where my talent, skills and knowledge are fully utilized to contribute towards organizational success and achieve career objectives. I believe that my technical, functional and communication skills will enable me in facing the challenging career ahead.

Results-driven Senior Frontend Developer with over 10+ years of experience in building responsive, high-performance web applications. Proven track record of leading development teams, architecting complex UI systems, and delivering exceptional user experiences. Strong focus on code quality, performance optimization, and cross-browser compatibility.

  • Designed and developed fully responsive websites using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap V5.
  • Converted PSD to HTML designs into high-quality, responsive HTML and WordPress websites.
  • Built landing pages optimized for conversions and performance.
  • Designed and coded email templates compatible with major email clients.
  • Ability to work on new builds, redesigns, and maintenance
  • Redesigned existing websites to improve UI/UX, performance, and accessibility.
  • Developed WordPress websites using Elementor, including custom layouts and styling.
  • Created social media posts, Website banners.
  • Optimized images and assets to reduce page load time.
  • Performed cross-browser testing and fixed compatibility issues.
  • Collaborated with designers, developers, and clients to meet project requirements.

• Responsive Web & UI Design
  • Front-End Development
  • PSD to HTML & Wix, WordPress
  • Website Redesign & Optimization
  • Landing Page & Email Template Design
  • Cross-Browser & Device Compatibility
  • Graphic & Social Media Design
  • CMS-Based Website Development

Programming & Markup:

  • HTML5 (Semantic Markup)
  • CSS3 (Flexbox, Grid, Animations, Media Queries)
  • JavaScript, jQuery
  • Responsive Design (Mobile, Tablet, Desktop)

UI / UX & Design:

  • PSD to HTML / WordPress Conversion
  • Website Redesign & Layout Improvements
  • Landing Page Design (HTML)
  • Email Template Design
  • UI Design for Responsive Websites

Frameworks & Libraries:

  • Bootstrap 4 & Bootstrap 5
  • Basic React.js

CMS & Website Platforms:

  • WordPress CMS (Elementor)
  • Wix Website Development

Design Tools:

  • Adobe Photoshop
  • Canva (Social Media Post as per client's requirements)

Development & Code Editors:

  • Visual Studio Code
  • Adobe Dreamweaver
  • Sublime Text Editor

Testing, SEO & Optimization:

  • BrowserStack and Lamda Platform (Cross-Browser Testing)
  • XENU Link Sleuth
  • SEO Tools (On-page SEO basics)
  • Image Optimization (Compression & Resizing)
  • Google Page Speed Test, Google Mobile Friendly Test, Google Structured Data Testing Tool

Key Achievements:

  • Delivered multiple responsive websites with 100% mobile compatibility
  • Improved website performance through image and asset optimization
  • Successfully redesigned websites resulting in improved user experience
  • Maintained strong client satisfaction through clear communication and timely delivery

Soft Skills:

  • Strong team collaboration
  • Effective problem-solving ability
  • Time management and attention to detail
  • Ability to work independently and under deadlines
